title: Green Goddess Salad Dressing
summary: A green goddess dressing that's so good you'll want to swim laps in it. Add it to salads to combine it with your choice of protein, veg and topping to create your perfect meal-prep dish.

method.description: Halve and de-stone the avocado and add the flesh to a blender along with the green chilli, fresh coriander, fresh mint and the juice of the lemon. Blitz to combine then season generously to taste with salt and pepper.
Toss the dressing through a salad or, if meal prepping for the week, transfer to a jar or container and store in the fridge until ready to eat.

chefs.name: Elena Silcock
chefs.summary: Elena Silcock is the Managing food editor at Mob. She's also a food writer, chef and food stylist who has worked for various brands including BBC Good Food and Olive Magazine as well as in the kitchens of restaurants in both London and Copenhagen.
